base_read.sql: SELECT p.person_last_name AS LAST_NAME, p.party_id AS CONTACT_ID, p.person_first_name AS FIRST_NAME FROM hz_parties p WHERE p.party_type = 'PERSON' AND p.person_last_name LIKE :PREFIX || 'RTCon%'

interface_read.sql: SELECT i.last_name AS LAST_NAME, i.contact_interface_id AS CONTACT_INTERFACE_ID, (SELECT LISTAGG(CASE WHEN r.attribute IS NOT NULL THEN r.reject_lookup_code || ' [' || r.attribute || ']' ELSE r.reject_lookup_code END, '; ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY r.rejection_id) FROM poz_supplier_int_rejections r WHERE r.parent_table = 'POZ_SUP_CONTACTS_INT' AND r.parent_id = i.contact_interface_id) AS ERROR_MESSAGE FROM poz_sup_contacts_int i WHERE i.load_request_id = :LRID
